connectionReason: Carrying girder with 3 truss seat(s) — Multi-Truss (Flush Bottom)
usageNote: Open Simpson Hanger Selector, choose "Multi-Truss (Flush Bottom)", then copy values from the filled column.

hsReference.title: Simpson Strong-Tie Hanger Selector — Parameter Reference
notes: All three UI connection types use one API endpoint; flushOption distinguishes joist vs truss.
Loads are ASD (Allowable Stress Design) in pounds unless noted.
Download/uplift duration factors map to designInformations.downloadDurationType and upliftLoadDurationType.
